free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of 1.37 GeV

and 48Ca (67.1 %). The targets consisted of strips

telescope at 18 degr. for intensity beam monitoring
incident alpha-particles was determined by measurements

The errors given are due to statistics,

the correction for the finite angular resolution.
